ogTitle: Bendalong vs Bendick Murrell: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bendalong and Bendick Murrell.
heading: Bendalong vs Bendick Murrell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bendalong, New South Wales and Bendick Murrell, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bendalong has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Bendick Murrell (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bendalong or Bendick Murrell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bendalong has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Bendick Murrell scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bendalong scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Bendick Murrell scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bendalong or Bendick Murrell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bendalong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.42% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
